description: Fraud involving fake rental listings, impersonated landlords, false military or company identity, QR code traps, deposits before property verification or phishing for tenant documents.
recommended_actions: Do not pay any deposit before verifying the property and owner through reliable channels.
Avoid scanning QR codes or approving UPI collect requests to receive money.
Verify listings through site visits, society office, official documents and trusted platforms.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve listing links, chats, phone numbers, bank details, UPI IDs and payment receipts.

rules.name: Deposit Before Visit
rules.explanation: Asks for token money or security deposit before the tenant has verified or visited the property.
examples: Pay token amount now to hold the flat before visit.
Deposit is refundable. Transfer today to confirm booking.

rules.name: Too Good To Be True Rent
rules.explanation: Advertises unusually low rent or attractive terms to lure quick deposits.
examples: Luxury 2BHK fully furnished at very low rent. Owner abroad.
No brokerage and low deposit. Book immediately.

rules.name: Army Defence or Company ID Impersonation
rules.explanation: Uses military, police or company identity documents to create false trust and rush payment.
examples: I am an army officer and attached my ID. Pay booking amount.
Transfer order received, so I need to rent my flat urgently.

rules.name: QR Code To Receive Deposit
rules.explanation: Uses QR code or UPI collect request fraud, often claiming it is needed to receive a refund or verify payment.
examples: Scan QR and enter UPI PIN to receive refund.
Approve collect request to verify your bank account.

rules.name: Fake Listing Photos or Reused Images
rules.explanation: Relies on photos or videos instead of real property verification and may reuse images from other listings.
examples: Owner is not in city, but photos are real. Pay token now.
Keys are with guard. Booking first, visit later.

rules.name: Fake Agreement or Police Verification Fee
rules.explanation: Requests extra charges for fake paperwork before the rental relationship is verified.
examples: Pay police verification fee before visiting the flat.
Transfer agreement charge and society gate pass fee.

rules.name: Identity Document Harvesting
rules.explanation: Collects sensitive tenant documents before property or owner verification, enabling identity misuse.
examples: Send Aadhaar, PAN and salary slip before flat visit.
KYC is required before sharing location.

rules.name: Platform Bypass Request
rules.explanation: Moves the conversation and payment outside trusted rental platforms to avoid moderation and evidence trails.
examples: Message me on WhatsApp and pay directly to personal account.
Do not pay through app. I will delete listing soon.

rules.name: Urgent Relocation Pressure
rules.explanation: Creates urgency so the victim pays before verifying ownership, location or legitimacy.
examples: Many tenants are waiting. Pay now to confirm.
I am leaving city today, so decide fast.
